title: Jewelers Delight
description: A small mod adding a jeweler villager and a various assortment of jewelry.
body:
Welcome! Today, I have created a very simple, yet fun mod. This is a mod that adds a few things. These include:

  Jeweler Villager Profession
  Ring and Necklace items
  Gold Ring and Necklace items
  Diamond Ring and Necklace items
  Emerald Ring and Necklace items
  Ring and Necklace Curios armor slot
  Much More to Come!

Dependencies:
1.1.0+ Requires Curios API

Credits:
MCreator (Link 1)
Curios API (Link 2)
Ring pixel art by Sebastion Bamford on Twitter (Link 3)
Necklace pixel art by 588ku on PNGTree (Link 4)
